       if (guistate == null) {&#10;            return;&#10;        }&#10;&#10;        String localDir = "";&#10;        String fileExtension = "";&#10;        String fileName = "";&#10;&#10;        if ("CraftTweaker".equals(RecipeGeneratorModVariables.selectedMethod)) {&#10;
